what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment id att-308dba9a to a board item (item-05136284) in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-05136284.
standouts: The file's only payload is a board:// URI target.
It functions as a persistent pointer from a channel attachment to a board item.
conventions: Follows a YAML-frontmatter metadata file convention.
Uses a channel-memory attachment naming scheme (att-<id>.md).
concerns: The body is empty, so no context or rationale is captured beyond the link.
The 'added' timestamp is dated in the future relative to today, which may be a data-entry or clock issue.
notes: A bare channel-to-board-item attachment record with just a URI target and a timestamp.
questions: What content or action does board item item-05136284 represent?
What operations are expected for an attachment_type of 'board_items'?
Why is the added timestamp future-dated?
Who or what process created this attachment?
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to record that a specific board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel memory, creating a traceable reference.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme as the target of a channel attachment metadata record.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, timestamped association between attachment att-308dba9a and board item item-05136284 within the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: This is a channel attachment metadata file that records a board_items link from the dragnet-development channel to board item item-05136284, added on 2026-06-24.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to persist the attachment relationship between a channel memory entry and a specific board item for later retrieval or traceability.
